docTitle: IBhayibhili ngokukhangela kunye · Kusukela ekudalweni kuze kube sebandleni

share.title: IBhayibhili ngokukhangela kunye
share.text: Ngokuskrola kunye, thola indaba enkulu yeBhayibhili — lokuthi kungani uJesu weza.

epochs.title: Ukudalwa
epochs.events: Insuku eziyisithupha zokudala, abantu badalwa ngomfanekiso kaNkulunkulu, ukuphumula kweSabatha
epochs.christ: Umhlaba wadalwa nge“Lizwi”. IVangeli likaJohane litshumayela ukuthi liLizwi nguJesu ngokwakhe (Joha 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
IBhayibhili kaliqalisi ngempikiswano yefilosofi kodwa ngesimemezelo: “Ekuqaleni uNkulunkulu…” Umhlaba kawusiyo ingozi engahleliwanga kodwa ngumsebenzi kaNkulunkulu ongumuntu.

  • Umfanekiso kaNkulunkulu · phakathi kwazo zonke izidalwa, ngabantu kuphela abadalwa ukuze bafanane loNkulunkulu — ukuze bamazi banakekele umhlaba.
  • Ukuphumula · ukuphumula kosuku lwesikhombisa kutshengisa ukuthi konke kuphelele kulokuthula (shalom): “kwakukuhle”.
  • I-Edeni · umhlaba ungakephuki, lapho uNkulunkulu labantu behamba ndawonye.

epochs.title: Ukuwa
epochs.one: Isono sangena, lobudlelwano phakathi kwabantu loNkulunkulu baqunywa.
epochs.events: Ukudla isithelo esalelwayo, ukuxotshwa e-Edeni, ukufika kokufa lokutshikatshika
epochs.q: Ngizavusa inzondano phakathi kwakho lowesifazana … Yona izachoboza ikhanda lakho.
epochs.christ: Isithembiso sokuqala sevangeli, esanikwa khonokho ngemva kokuwa: “inzalo yowesifazana” izachoboza ikhanda lenyoka — lalowo nguJesu (Gen 3:15; Roma 16:20; Gal 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Ngokungalaleli kokuzama ukuthi “sibe njengoNkulunkulu”, isono sangena emhlabeni. Umphumela kawusiwo nje ukwephula umthetho kodwa ubudlelwano obephukileyo.

  • Ubudlelwano obephukileyo · loNkulunkulu (ukucatsha), omunye komunye (ukusolana), lemvelo (ameva lokutshikatshika).
  • Ukufa · isixwayiso esithi “uzakufa lokufa” sesisiba liqiniso.
  • Gen 3:15 · kanti phakathi kwesahlulelo, isithembiso sokuhlengwa siza kuqala. Izifundiswa zikubiza ngokuthi yi-protoevangelium (ivangeli lokuqala).
epochs.next: Khathesi uNkulunkulu ubiza indoda eyodwa ukuqalisa ukuhlenga…

epochs.title: Obhaba bokuqala
epochs.events: Isivumelwano sikaAbrahama, ukubotshwa kukaIsaka, amadodana alitshumi lambili kaJakhobe, uJosefa ukhuphukela emandleni eGibithe
epochs.q: Ngizakukwenza ube yisizwe esikhulu … lonke usendo lomhlaba luzazicelela ukubusiswa njengawe.
epochs.christ: Isithembiso sokuthi “zonke izizwe zizabusiswa” sigcwaliseka kuJesu, inzalo kaAbrahama (Gal 3:16).
epochs.detail:
UNkulunkulu uqalisa ukubhekana lenkinga yabo bonke abantu ngokubiza indoda eyodwa, uAbrahama. Inhliziyo yakho yisivumelwano (isithembiso) — isizwe esikhulu, ilizwe, le“sibusiso kuzo zonke izizwe”.

  • Ukukholwa · uAbrahama wakholwa isithembiso esingabonakaliyo, njalo kwabalelwa kuye njengokulunga (Gen 15:6).
  • UIsaka loJakhobe · isithembiso siyadlulela; uJakhobe (uIsrayeli) uzala izizwe ezilitshumi lambili.
  • UJosefa · wathengiswa ngabafowabo kodwa waphakanyiswa emandleni — “uNkulunkulu wakuphendula kwaba ngokuhle” (Gen 50:20).
epochs.next: Ngemva kukaJosefa, usapho lwehlela eGibithe — lwaba yizigqili…

epochs.title: UkuPhuma loseNkangala
epochs.one: UNkulunkulu wahlenga abantu ababeyizigqili wabenza abakhe.
epochs.events: Izinhlupho ezilitshumi, iPhasika, ukuchapha uLwandle oluBomvu, iMilayo eliTshumi eSinayi, ithabhanekele, iminyaka engamatshumi amane enkangala
epochs.q: Ngizalithatha libe ngabantu bami, mina ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu.
epochs.christ: IPhasika — lapho igazi lewundlu lasusa ukufa — likhomba kuJesu, “iwundlu lethu lePhasika”, owabethelwa esiphambanweni ngenxa yethu (1 Kor 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Ukuhlengwa okukhulu kakhulu kweThestamente eliDala. UIsrayeli owayeyisigqili ukhululwa ngamandla kaNkulunkulu wenziwa abantu bakhe.

  • IPhasika · indlu elophawu lwegazi lewundlu yedlulwa ngukufa — isimo esisekelo sayo yonke imihlatshelo eyalandelayo.
  • ULwandle oluBomvu · insindiso lapho indlela isiphelile; “ukuchapha” kuba luphawu lwesiqaliso esitsha.
  • Isivumelwano seSinayi · ngeMilayo bafunda ukuthi baphile njani njengabantu bakaNkulunkulu.
  • Ithabhanekele · indlu engcwele ehambayo lapho uNkulunkulu ehlala phakathi kwabantu bakhe — ukunambitha kuqala kwe“Imanuweli”.
  • Iminyaka engamatshumi amane · ukungalaleli kwenza isizukulwana sibhode, kodwa uNkulunkulu uhlala eseduze ngemana lensika yeyezi lomlilo.
epochs.next: Bemi emngceleni welizwe lesithembiso, balungiselela ukungena…

epochs.title: UkuNqoba laBahluleli
epochs.one: Bathola ilizwe, kodwa kungelankosi wonke umuntu wenza ngokuthanda kwakhe.
epochs.events: Ukuwa kweJeriko, ukuhlala eKhanani, umjikelezo ophindaphindwayo wesono–isahlulelo–insindiso
epochs.q: Ngalezonsuku kwakungelankosi koIsrayeli. Bonke abantu babezenzela abakuthandayo.
epochs.christ: Kusukela osendweni lukaRuthe kuvela uDavida, losendweni lukaDavida kuvela uJesu (Mathewu 1). Lasephithizelweni, usendo lukaMesiya luyaqhubeka.
epochs.detail:
Ngaphansi kukaJoshuwa bangena ilizwe lesithembiso, kodwa sebehlalile masinyane bayamkhohlwa uNkulunkulu. ABahluleli yisimo esifananayo esiphindaphindwayo.

  • Umjikelezo owehlayo · isono → ukucindezelwa → ukukhala → umhluleli uyahlenga → isono futhi. Kuya kusiba kubi.
  • Abahluleli · uGidiyoni, uSamsoni, uDebora — abahlengi besikhatshana, abalamaqhawe kodwa abalamaphutha amakhulu.
  • URuthe · indaba ekhanyayo yokuthembeka esikhathini esimnyama; owesifazana wezizwe ungena osendweni lukaDavida (lukaJesu).

epochs.title: Umbuso oManyeneyo
epochs.one: UNkulunkulu uthembisa uDavida, “Isihlalo sakho sizahlala kuze kube nininini.”
epochs.events: Inkosi yokuqala uSawuli, uDavida loGoliyathi, isivumelwano sikaDavida, uSolomoni wakha ithempeli
epochs.q: Indlu yakho lombuso wakho kuzaqiniswa njalonjalo phambi kwami; lesihlalo sakho sobukhosi simiswe kuze kube nininini.
epochs.christ: “Isihlalo sobukhosi esingapheliyo” sigcwaliseka kuJesu, indodana kaDavida — yikho ebizwa ngokuthi “iNdodana kaDavida” (Luka 1:32-33; Mathewu 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Isikhwele sikaIsrayeli, ngaphansi kwamakhosi amathathu.

  • USawuli · inkosi abantu abayicelayo; isiqaliso esihle esonakaliswa ngokungalaleli.
  • UDavida · “umuntu olenhliziyo efana lekaNkulunkulu”. Unqoba uGoliyathi enze iJerusalema libe lidolobho elikhulu. Wenza isono esikhulu (uBhathisheba) kanti uyaphenduka ngenhliziyo (iHubo 51).
  • Isivumelwano sikaDavida (2 Sam 7) · uNkulunkulu uthembisa ukumisa umbuso kaDavida kuze kube nininini — impande eqakathekileyo yethemba likaMesiya.
  • USolomoni · esikhwini sokuhlakanipha lenotho wakha ithempeli, kodwa ekupheleni kokuphila kwakhe waphendukela ezithombeni.
epochs.next: Ngemva kukaSolomoni, umbuso wehlukana waba mibili…

epochs.title: Umbuso owEhlukeneyo
epochs.one: Wehlukene waba yiningizimu (uJuda) lenyakatho (uIsrayeli), isizwe sikhukhulekela ekonakaleni.
epochs.people: Amakhosi emibuso yomibili; abaprofethi njengoElija, uIsaya, uJeremiya
epochs.events: Umbuso uyehlukana, ukukhonza izithombe kuyanda, abaprofethi bayaxwayisa
epochs.q: Kusukela kulesosikhathi abakoIsrayeli bayihlamuka indlu kaDavida kuze kube lamhla.
epochs.christ: Kulesisikhathi abaprofethi babikezela uMesiya ozayo ngokukhanya okukhulayo (Isaya 9:6; Isaya 53).
epochs.detail:
Ensukwini zendodana kaSolomoni isizwe sehlukana: umbuso wenyakatho uIsrayeli (izizwe ezilitshumi, idolobho iSamariya) lombuso weningizimu uJuda (izizwe ezimbili, idolobho iJerusalema).

  • UIsrayeli (inyakatho) · inkosi inye lenye ikhonza izithombe; uwela kuAsiriya ngo-722 BC.
  • UJuda (iningizimu) · usendo lukaDavida luyaqhubeka, kulamakhosi amalutshwana amahle njengoHezekhiya loJosiya, kodwa jikelele uyehla.
  • Abaprofethi · uElija, uAmosi, uIsaya, uJeremiya bakhala bathi “buyelani!” Isiphrofetho sikaMesiya sifika esiqongweni saso lapha (“inceku ehluphekayo” kaIsaya 53).
epochs.next: Ekucineni isahlulelo esixwayisiweyo siyafika — bathunjelwa ezizweni…

epochs.title: UkuThunjwa
epochs.one: Isizwe siyadilika abantu bahudulelwa emazweni ezizwe.
epochs.events: UIsrayeli uwela kuAsiriya (722), uJuda uwela kuBhabhiloni lethempeli liyadilizwa (586)
epochs.q: Ngasemifuleni yaseBabiloni sahlala phansi sakhala, lapho sikhumbula iZiyone.
epochs.christ: Ekujuleni kokuphelelwa lithemba uJeremiya uthembisa “isivumelwano esitsha” (Jeremiya 31:31) — sona kanye isivumelwano uJesu asiqinisa eKudleni kweNkosi kokuCina.
epochs.detail:
Izixwayiso ziyagcwaliseka. Ithempeli liyatsha abantu bahudulelwa eBhabhiloni — belahlekelwa lilizwe, linkosi, lethempeli: indawo ephansi kakhulu kuzo zonke.

  • Ukuwa kabili · uIsrayeli (uAsiriya, 722 BC) loJuda (uBhabhiloni, 586 BC).
  • UDaniyeli · isibonelo sokukholwa lasenkundleni yabahedeni (umgodi wezilwane); ubona imibono ye“mbuso ongapheliyo” ozayo.
  • Ilangabi lethemba · umbono kaHezekheli wamathambo omileyo aphilayo (Hezekheli 37) le“sivumelwano esitsha” sikaJeremiya kukhomba ikusasa ebumnyameni.
epochs.next: Ngemva kweminyaka engamatshumi ayisikhombisa, uNkulunkulu uvula indlela — bayabuyela ekhaya…

epochs.title: UkuBuya
epochs.events: Ukubuya ngomthetho kaKoresi, ukwakha kabusha ithempeli, ukubuyisela imiduli yeJerusalema, ukubuyisa iLizwi
epochs.christ: UMalaki, ugwalo lokucina lweThestamente eliDala, uphetha ngokubikezela isithunywa esilungisa indlela kaMesiya: “Khangelani, ngiyasithuma isithunywa sami” (Malaki 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Ngomthetho wenkosi yePheresiya uKoresi (538 BC) ukubuya kuyaqalisa. Ngamaviyo amathathu bayabuya bakhe kabusha okwadilizwayo.

  • UZerubabeli · uvuselela ithempeli (laphethwa ngo-516 BC).
  • UEzra · ufundisa iLizwi futhi avuselele ukukholwa.
  • UNehemiya · uvuselela imiduli yeJerusalema ngensuku ezingamatshumi amahlanu lambili.
  • UEsta · usindisa amaJuda ePheresiya ekubhujisweni — “mhlawumbe wafikela isikhathi esinjengalesi”.
  • Belokhe belangatha · ithempeli limile, kodwa kayikho inkosi efana loDavida. Abantu balindele uMesiya.
epochs.next: Kwasekuthi… kungathi izulu lithula, kwadlula iminyaka engamakhulu amane.

epochs.title: Iminyaka yokuThula
epochs.one: Iminyaka engamakhulu amane kungelalizwi lomprofethi — kanti inkundla yayilungiswa buthule.
epochs.events: IPheresiya → iGrisi → inkululeko yamaMakabhi → ukubusa kweRoma
epochs.q: Kodwa kwathi isikhathi sesiphelele, uNkulunkulu wathumela iNdodana yakhe, yazalwa ngowesifazana.
epochs.christ: Konke lokhu “kulungiswa kwenkundla” kwakunguNkulunkulu esebenza ukuze uJesu eze kanye “ekugcwalisekeni kwesikhathi”.
epochs.detail:
Kusukela kuMalaki kuze kufike eThestamenteni eliTsha, kudlula iminyaka engaba ngamakhulu amane kungelambhalo omutsha. Kanti ngemva kwembali uNkulunkulu wayelungisa indlela yevangeli.

  • Imibuso iyaguquguquka · iPheresiya → iGrisi (uAleksanda, 333 BC) → amaPtolemi lamaSeleuki → ukuvukela kwamaMakabhi (167 BC) → iRoma (63 BC).
  • IsiGriki · ukunqoba kukaAleksanda kwenza isiGriki sibe lulimi olujwayelekileyo; iThestamente eliDala laguqulelwa esiGrikini (iSeptuagint), kuvula indlela yevangeli ukuthi liqhele masinyane.
  • Imigwaqo lokuthula kweRoma · imigwaqo eyakhiwe kuhle le“Pax Romana” kuba yimigwaqo yevangeli.
  • Amasinagoge lamaqembu · ukufundisa esinagogeni kuyagxila; abaFarisi labaSaduki bayavela; lekulangazelela uMesiya kuyavuthwa.

epochs.title: UJesu uyeza
epochs.people: UJesu, abafundi abalitshumi lambili, uJohane uMbhabhathizi
epochs.events: Ukuba yinyama, inkonzo yakhe lokufundisa lezimangaliso, ukufa esiphambanweni, ukuvuka ngosuku lwesithathu
epochs.q: ULizwi waba yinyama, wahlala phakathi kwethu … egcwele umusa leqiniso.
epochs.christ: Inzalo yowesifazana (isigaba 2), isibusiso sikaAbrahama (3), iwundlu lePhasika (4), inkosi engapheliyo kaDavida (6), isivumelwano esitsha (8) — konke kugcwaliseka emuntwini munye, uJesu: uMprofethi, uMphristi, leNkosi yethu yeqiniso.
epochs.detail:
Ukuthula kuyephuka; oThenjisiweyo uyafika. AmaVangeli amane afakaza ngempilo, ukufa, lokuvuka kukaJesu ngamacele amane.

  • Ukuba yinyama · uNkulunkulu uba ngumuntu (Imanuweli, “uNkulunkulu ulathi”), endaweni ephansi yaseBhethelehema.
  • Inkonzo · ufundisa umbuso kaNkulunkulu, asilise abagulayo, abize izoni. “Ongibonileyo ubonile uBaba.”
  • Isiphambano · ubhadala intengo yesono lokufa okwabangelwa yikuwa (isigaba 2). Iwundlu leqiniso lePhasika.
  • Ukuvuka · evuka ngosuku lwesithathu, wephula amandla esono, ukufa, loSathane — kanti esiphambanweni “wabamuka izikhali ababusi labalamandla … wabanqoba” (Kolose 2:15).

Ngakho uJesu unguMprofethi wethu weqiniso (etshengisa indlela eya kuNkulunkulu), uMphristi wethu weqiniso (ebuyisana ngesono ngomzimba wakhe), leNkosi yethu yeqiniso (enqoba isono, ukufa, loSathane abuse kuze kube nininini).
epochs.next: UJesu ovukileyo uthuma abafundi bakhe emhlabeni…

epochs.title: Ibandla liyaqala
epochs.one: UMoya uyeza, ivangeli liqhele kuze kube semikhawulweni yomhlaba.
epochs.events: UMoya uthululwa ngePentekosti, ibandla liyazalwa, ivangeli liqhela liphuma eJerusalema liye eRoma ngokuhlukunyezwa
epochs.q: Lizakwamukela amandla, esefikile phezu kwenu uMoya oNgcwele … kuze kube semikhawulweni yomhlaba.
epochs.christ: Indaba le isaqhubeka. IBhayibhili liphetha ngokuthembisa ukuthi uJesu uzabuya enze izinto zonke zibe zintsha (Isambulo 21).
epochs.detail:
Ngemva kokuthi uJesu enyukele ezulwini, uMoya owathenjiswayo uyeza ngePentekosti ibandla liyazalwa. Ivangeli liqhela ngamandla amakhulu.

  • IPentekosti · uMoya uguqula abafundi abesabayo babe ngofakazi abalesibindi.
  • UPhethro · utshumayela ivangeli kumaJuda eJerusalema.
  • UPawuli · esuka kuba ngumzingeli aze abe ngumphostoli, ehlanyela amabandla emhlabeni wabezizwe ebhala lezincwadi.
  • Kuze kube semikhawulweni yomhlaba · iJerusalema → iJudiya → iSamariya → iRoma. Isithembiso sikaAbrahama se“zizwe zonke” siyagcwaliseka.
  • Lathi · indaba kayipheli; iqhubekela ekubuyeni kukaJesu lasezulwini elitsha lomhlaba omutsha.

epochs.title: UkuVuselelwa
epochs.one: UJesu uyabuya enze izinto zonke zibe zintsha.
epochs.events: Ukubuya kwesibili, isahlulelo sokucina, ukuphela kwesono·ukufa·izinyembezi, izulu elitsha lomhlaba omutsha
epochs.q: Azesule izinyembezi zonke emehlweni abo; ukufa kakusayikuba khona, lokulila lokukhala lobuhlungu.
epochs.christ: I-Edeni yokudala kokuqala iyavuselelwa ekucineni njenge“Jerusalema eNtsha”. UNkulunkulu uhlala labantu bakhe kuze kube nininini — ukugcwala kweImanuweli (Isambulo 21:3; Mathewu 1:23).
epochs.detail:
IBhayibhili kalipheli ngesikhathi sebandla. Ugwalo lwalo lokucina, iSambulo, lutshengisa uJesu ebuya ukuphelelisa konke.

  • Ukubuya kwesibili · inkosi eyathenjiswayo iyabuya ngenkazimulo.
  • Ukunqoba kokucina · uSathane lokufa kuyanqotshwa kuze kube nininini, uKristu abuse njengeNkosi yamakhosi (1 Kor 15:25-26; Isambulo 20:10).
  • Isahlulelo lokuvuka · konke okubi kuyalungiswa, labafileyo bayavuswa.
  • Izulu elitsha lomhlaba omutsha · isono, ukufa, izinyembezi, lobuhlungu kuyanyamalala kuze kube nininini (Isambulo 21:4).
  • I-Edeni evuselelweyo · e“Jerusalema eNtsha” engcono kulesiqaliso, uNkulunkulu uhlala labantu bakhe kuze kube nininini — okuyiyo indawo iBhayibhili lonke ebeliqonda kuyo.

Ngakho khathesi yisikhathi se“sekwenzakele, kodwa kungakapheleli”: kuJesu insindiso isiyenzakele kodwa ukuphela kwayo kusalindelwe.

core.title: Isono sokuqala — kakho olungileyo
core.body: Inkinga kayisiyo “izenzo ezimbili ezimbi” kodwa yimpande yenhliziyo. Kusukela kuAdamu, wonke umuntu uzalwa engaphansi kwesono ngeke afinyelele kuNkulunkulu ngokwakhe.
core.vtext: Kakho olungileyo, kakho loyedwa … Bonke bonile, basilele enkazimulweni kaNkulunkulu.

core.title: Umlayo ngeke ungisindise
core.body: Umlayo kawusiyo isikhwelo kodwa yisibuko. Umzamo wakho omkhulu, yikho umbuso obonisa kuhle ukuthi usilela kangakanani. Inhloso yawo yikusiholela kuKristu.
core.vtext: Ngomlayo kuvela ukwazi isono kuphela … umlayo wawungumlondolozi wethu kwaze kwafika uKristu.

core.title: Ngomusa — yisipho, hatshi umzamo
core.body: Insindiso kayisiyo iholo lokusebenza okuzuze, kodwa yisipho samahala kulabo abangakufanelanga. Ngakho kakho ongazincoma.
core.vtext: Lisilisiwe ngomusa ngokukholwa … Kakuveli ngemisebenzi, funa kube khona ozincomayo.

core.title: Silungisiswa ngokukholwa
core.body: Hatshi ngokugcina umlayo, kodwa ngokukholwa kuJesu Kristu, uthiwa ulungile — wembathiswa hatshi ukulunga kwakho kodwa okwakhe.
core.vtext: Lokhu sesilungisisiwe ngokukholwa … umuntu kalungisiswa ngemisebenzi yomlayo, kuphela ngokukholwa kuKristu Jesu.

core.title: IBhayibhili likhomba kuJesu
core.body: IBhayibhili kalisiwo ugwalo lwabantu abakhulu kumbe lokuzisiza. Kusukela kuGenesisi kuze kube seSambulweni, ikhasi ngalinye lifakaza ngomuntu munye — uJesu Kristu.
core.vtext: Yiyo engifakazelayo … wabachasisela emibhalweni yonke izinto eziqondene laye.

core.title: Umbuso kaNkulunkulu — umlayezo oqakathekileyo kaJesu
core.body: Indikimba uJesu ayifundisa kakhulu. Ukubusa kukaNkulunkulu njengeNkosi kwangena kulumhlaba ngoJesu njalo kuzaphelela mhla ebuya. Ngesiphambano lokuvuka kwakhe, uJesu uyiNkosi yeqiniso enqoba isono, ukufa, loSathane.
core.vtext: Isikhathi sesiphelele, umbuso kaNkulunkulu ususondele; phendukani, likholwe ivangeli.

core.title: Ivangeli — wakuqeda konke
core.body: Intengo yesono engangingeke ngiyibhadale, uJesu wayibhadala esikhundleni sami esiphambanweni, langokuvuka wanqoba ukufa. Kangithembeli ku“yenza lokhu” kodwa ku“kuphelile”.
core.vtext: Kuphelile … uNkulunkulu uqinisa uthando lwakhe kithi ngalokhu ukuthi uKristu wasifela siseyizoni.

mis.w: “Kungani uNkulunkulu wadala abantu ababengona? Bekungaba ngcono ukungasidali yini?”
mis.t: UNkulunkulu wadala umhlaba labantu hatshi ngenxa yokuswela kodwa ngothando oluchichimayo. Ukwenza abantu babe ngabantu abalobudlelwano loNkulunkulu ngokwakho luthando. Lokungena kwesono kakubanga ngaphandle kwecebo lensindiso likaNkulunkulu (Efesu 1:4-5). Isigaba sokuqala seBhayibhili kasisiso isahlulelo kodwa luthando.

mis.w: “Ukuxotshwa anikwe lokufa ngenxa yokudla isithelo esisodwa — kanti uNkulunkulu kalukhuni kakhulu yini?”
mis.t: Ukususwa e-Edeni kwakuyisahlulelo njalo lomusa. Ukudla esihlahleni sokuphila uphile kuze kube nininini kuleso simo esephukileyo, esixhwamukene loNkulunkulu, bekuzakuba yikubotshelwa ekuhluphekeni kuze kube nininini (Gen 3:22). Ukuvumela ukufa kwavula indlela yokubuya, njalo khonokho uNkulunkulu wathembisa uMhlengi (Gen 3:15). Uthando lwaluvele lukhona phakathi kwesahlulelo.

mis.w: “UAbrahama wakhethwa ngenxa yokukholwa kwakhe okukhulu — kanti bonke abantu beBhayibhili kabasiwo amaqhawe okuziphatha yini?”
mis.t: UAbrahama waqamba amanga njalo wathandabuza; uJakhobe wayengumkhohlisi. UNkulunkulu kabizanga abantu “abafaneleyo” kodwa abalamaphutha, ngomusa. Isizatho kwakungesiyo inhle yabo kodwa luthando oluthembekileyo lukaNkulunkulu (Duteronomi 7:7-8).

mis.w: “Kanti umlayo (iMilayo) kawusiwo ukuhlolwa okumele ukuphumelele ukuze usindiswe yini?”
mis.t: UNkulunkulu wabahlenga ngaphambi kokunika umlayo. Lemilayo eliTshumi iqalisa ngesimemezelo sensindiso: “NgiyiNkosi uNkulunkulu wakho eyakukhupha eGibithe” (Eks 20:2). Umlayo kawusiwo “gcina ukuze usindiswe”, kodwa ngumkhokeli wothando wokuthi abantu asebehlengiwe baphile njani (Duteronomi 7:7-9). Umusa uhlala uqala; ukulalela kuyimpendulo.

mis.w: “Ukunqotshwa kweKhanani kwakuyikubulala okungelasihawu — ngakho uNkulunkulu weThestamente eliDala ulesihluku.”
mis.t: Le yindaba enzima engeke ixazululwe ngomutsho munye. Kodwa iBhayibhili kaliyethuli njengodlame olungahleliwanga kodwa njengesahlulelo ngemva kweminyaka eminengi yokubekezelela ububi obukhulu (kugoqela ukuhlatshelwa kwabantwana) (Gen 15:16; Duteronomi 9:4-5; Levitikusi 18:24-25). UNkulunkulu uphuza lokuthi ahlulele, njalo wabamukela ngentokozo labo abaphendukela kuye — labezizwe njengoRahabi loRuthe (Joshuwa 6:25; Ruthe 4:13-17).

mis.w: “UDavida wayeliqhawe elingelaphutha — yikho ebizwa ngokuthi ‘umuntu olenhliziyo efana lekaNkulunkulu’.”
mis.t: UDavida wafeba waze wabulala. “Umuntu olenhliziyo kaNkulunkulu” kakutsho ukungabi laphutha, kodwa lowo ongasifihlanga isono sakhe — owaphenduka ngokupheleleyo wahlala ebuyela kuNkulunkulu (iHubo 51). Uthando lukaNkulunkulu kalubalahli lalabo abawa kabuhlungu.

mis.w: “Abaprofethi ngababhuli ababikezela ikusasa / uNkulunkulu weThestamente eliDala ngowolaka kuphela.”
mis.t: Inhliziyo yomprofethi kayisiyo “ukubikezela ikusasa” kodwa yisicelo esibuhlungu sikaNkulunkulu: “Ngiyacela, buyani.” Lezixwayiso zesahlulelo kazihlosi ukubhubhisa kodwa ukuphendula abantu ukuze basinde — “kangithokozi ngokufa komubi” (Hezekheli 33:11).

mis.w: “Ukuthunjwa kufakazela ukuthi uNkulunkulu wamlahla ngokupheleleyo uIsrayeli.”
mis.t: Ukuthunjwa kwakungesiyo ukulahlwa kodwa kwakuyikulaya lokuhlanjululwa komntwana othandekayo (KumaHebheru 12:6). UNkulunkulu kasukanga; wayeloDaniyeli enhliziyweni yokuthunjwa wathembisa, “Ngiyazi mina imicabango engiyicabanga ngani … yimicabango yokuthula, kayisiyo eyokubi, ukuba ngilinike isikhathi esizayo esilethemba” (Jeremiya 29:11).

mis.w: “Kungelalizwi okweminyaka engamakhulu amane, uNkulunkulu wayesehambile kumbe ephumule.”
mis.t: Ukuthula kakusiyo ukungabikho. Wayengakhulumi nje, kanti ngaso sonke leso sikhathi wayehambisa imibuso, izindimi, lemigwaqo ukulungisa inkundla yensindiso. Ngesikhathi esithule kakhulu, uNkulunkulu wayesebenza nzima kakhulu, ngothando (Gal 4:4).

mis.w: “UJesu wayengumfundisi olungileyo wokuziphatha kuphela / isiphambano sasiyikwehlulwa okudabukisayo.”
mis.t: UJesu wathi unguNkulunkulu ngokwakhe (Johane 8:58), njalo isiphambano sasingesiyo ingozi loba ukwehlulwa kodwa kwakuluthando oluhleliweyo. Kazange ahuduzelwe khona ngamandla; wabeka phansi ukuphila kwakhe (Johane 10:18). “Kakho olothando olukhulu kulalolu lokuthi umuntu adele ukusila kwakhe ngenxa yabangane bakhe” (Johane 15:13).

mis.w: “Ibandla liyiklabhu yabantu abapheleleyo, kumbe yisakhiwo nje.”
mis.t: Ibandla kalisiwo umphakathi “wabangcwele abapheleleyo” kodwa wezoni ezithethelelweyo. Lomphostoli uPawuli wazibiza ngokuthi “engingesikhulu kuzo mina” (1 uTimothi 1:15). Ibandla lokuqala lalo laxabana laze lawa (ImiSebenzi 6:1; 1 Kor 1:11). Kasiyo indawo yokuzincoma, kodwa ngabantu abadlulisela uthando abaluthola (Johane 13:34-35).

love: Indaba iqalisa hatshi ngesahlulelo kodwa ngokudala okuthululwe ngothando.
Ngesikhathi abantu bona, uNkulunkulu wathembisa insindiso khonokho lapho.
UNkulunkulu weza kuqala kumuntu ongakufanelanga, wambiza ngebizo, wamenza umgelo wesibusiso.
Wezwa ukububula kwabantu ababeyizigqili wehla yena ngokwakhe ukubahlenga.
Lanxa bemnikela kokuphela, sonke isikhathi lapho bekhala wathuma umhlengi wabaphakamisa.
Kazange amlahle laye uDavida owayewile; ngaye wathembisa iNkosi engapheliyo.
Ebantwini ababemfulathele wahlala ethuma abaprofethi, encenga, “Ngiyacela, buyani ekhaya.”
Lasezweni elimnyama kakhulu lokuthunjwa wehla labo wathembisa ukuvuselelwa.
Lebantwini ababesehluleka kokuphela kazange ahoxise isithembiso sakhe.
Laphakathi kweminyaka engamakhulu amane yokuthula, engabonakali, wayelungisa indlela yensindiso.
Siseyizoni, wathuma iNdodana yakhe ukuthi ibeke phansi ukuphila kwayo.
Uthando esaluthola, khathesi uluthuma ukuthi luchichimele emhlabeni wonke.
Ekucineni uzakwesula izinyembezi zonke avuselele izinto zonke ngothando.

s.ui.footer: IBhayibhili ngokukhangela kunye · Amazwi eBhayibhili athethwe ku-iBhayibhili Elingcwele
s.hero.title:
IBhayibhili,
ngokukhangela kunye
s.hero.sub: Ngokuskrola kunye, thola indaba enkulu yeBhayibhili — lokuthi kungani uJesu weza.
s.thread.note: UNkulunkulu uyathembisa (isivumelwano), abantu balinda isikhathi eside, njalo ekucineni konke kuyagcwaliseka kuphelele kuJesu. Landela izigaba ezilitshumi lantathu ezingaphansi ngalumkhondo — thinta “Bala okunengi” kukhadi ngalinye ukuthola indaba ejulileyo.
s.gospel.sublead: Yindaba yokuthi uNkulunkulu, ngomusa kuphela, wahlenga njani izoni ezazingeke zizisindise. Phakathi kwayo kumi uJesu Kristu.
s.gospel.mirror:
Umjikelezo ongapheliyo kaIsrayeli empeleni ungumfanekiso “wami”

Ukukhonza izithombe→Ukuhlupheka→Ukukhala→UNkulunkulu uyahlenga→Ukukhonza izithombe futhi…

Kusukela kuBahluleli kuze kube sekuthunjweni, uIsrayeli uphindaphinda lumjikelezo kungapheli. IBhayibhili kaliloba lokhu ukuze sihleke sithi, “Babebuthakathaka kanjani.”

Yisibuko. Iphuzu kalisiso “uIsrayeli wenza njalo” kodwa “lami ngenza njalo” (1 Kor 10:11).

Isithombe kasisiso isifanekiso esibaziweyo kuphela. Yilo lonke esikuthandayo kumbe esikuthembayo okudlula uNkulunkulu — imali, impumelelo, ukwamukelwa, abantu, ngitsho lami uqobo. Lokusebenzisa uNkulunkulu njengethulusi lokuthola engikufunayo lakho kuyikukhonza izithombe.

Ekucineni, isithombe esijule kakhulu ngu“mina, ngihlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi sikaNkulunkulu.”
s.gospel.coreIntro: Pho uNkulunkulu uyisindisa njani isoni esinjalo? Nansi inhliziyo yevangeli iBhayibhili elilitshumayelayo.
s.gospel.crux:
IBhayibhili lonke likhomba endaweni eyodwa.

Abantu babengeke bawephule umjikelezo wesono ngokwabo, njalo kwakungelamuntu olungileyo. Ngakho kwakumele omunye abhadale intengo esikhundleni sabo.

UJesu kazanga nje ukufundisa izinto ezinhle. Kungelandlela yokungisindisa, kwakungelampikiswano wokuthi weze.

Owayemele alengiswe kuleso siphambano yimi.
UJesu wathwala isono sami wabethelwa khona esikhundleni sami.

“Yebo, yalinyazwa ngenxa yeziphambeko zethu, yachotshozwa ngenxa yobubi bethu … langamanxeba ayo siyasiliswa thina.” — Isa 53:5
s.faq.q1: ▸ Ngakho umbulali kufanele akholwe nje aye ezulwini, kanti umuntu olungileyo impilo yakhe yonke ongakholwayo uya esihogweni?
s.faq.a1:
Ngumbuzo ofaneleyo. Kodwa kulokungezwisisi okubili okufihlakeleyo kuwo.

① IBhayibhili kalehlukanisi abantu “ngabalungileyo labakhohlakeleyo.” Isilinganiso kasisiso “ungcono kulomakhelwane” kodwa “ubungcwele obupheleleyo bukaNkulunkulu.” Phambi kwakhe, kakho “olungileyo ngokwaneleyo” (Roma 3:23). Ngakho lokhu kakusiso “umuntu olungileyo lombulali” kodwa kufana labantu ababili abalesifo esibulalayo esifananayo — omunye uthatha umuthi, omunye uyawala esithi, “Ngiphilile kulalowaya.”

② Yinto eyodwa kuphela eyehlukanisa izulu lesihogo. Hatshi amaphuzu okwenza, kodwa ukuthi uyamamukele yini uJesu Kristu njengeNkosi lokuthi inkinga yakho yesono iyaxazululwa. Lowo osono sakhe sixazululwa ligazi likaKristu uya ezulwini; lowo ongamamukeliyo, osono sakhe sisekhona, kayi. Akukho ukulunga okungaxazulula leyonkinga yesono uqobo.

Ngakho izulu lesihogo kakusiso “umvuzo wokwenza okuhle” kodwa yindaba yobudlelwano loKristu. Le“kukholwa” kakusiyo ukuvumelana kwengqondo kodwa yikuguquka kwalowo oqondisa impilo yakho — wonke omamukela ngeqiniso kazikhukhumezi kodwa uphenduka kakhulu. Empeleni ukuzilungisisa (“ngingumuntu olungileyo”) yiso isithombe okunzima kakhulu ukusephula, esenza sicabange ukuthi kasimdingi uKristu (Luka 18:9-14).

IBhayibhili likutsho kucace: “Okholwa kiyo kalahlwa; kodwa ongakholwayo uselahliwe” (Joha 3:18). Isahlulelo kasiso “ukuhlola izenzo zakho usufile,” kodwa sesiqunyiwe ngokuthi wamamukela yini uKristu.

Roma 3:23 · Joha 3:18 · Efesu 2:8-9 · Luka 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Kanti angeke yini ngiphile impilo enhle nje ngingakholwa kuJesu?
s.faq.a2:
Ngumcabango ovame kakhulu, kodwa kawuyizwisisi inkinga eyiyo eqotho. Nansi isifanekiso.

Cabanga ukuthi usemkhunjini wamasela olwandle. Lokuba ugcina ipulango lihlanzeke kangakanani, ulobubele ebantwini emkhunjini kangakanani, impilo yakho iyisibonelo kangakanani — usewulisela, ngoba uthwelwe lomkhumbi uye lapho oqonde khona (ichweba lesahlulelo). Inkinga kayisiso “amaphuzu ezenzo” kodwa “ungowaliphi umkhumbi” (ubuwena).

Ngakho ivangeli kalitsho “zama kakhulu ukulunga”; lithi “tshintsha umkhumbi.” Yehla emkhunjini wesono uchaphele kuJesu — ebuntwini obutsha bomntwana kaNkulunkulu. Lokhu kakusiyo ukukhuphula amaphuzu akho ngomzamo, kodwa yikuthemba Lowo owelulela isandla sakhe uchaphele emkhunjini wakhe.

Empeleni iBhayibhili lichaza insindiso njengalokhu kanye — “Wasikhulula emandleni omnyama, wasisa embusweni weNdodana yakhe ethandekayo” (Kolose 1:13).

Ungezwisisi kubi: lokhu kakutsho ukuthi impilo enhle kayisizi lutho. Ubuhle kabusiso “isimo” sensindiso kodwa siyisithelo sayo. Lowo otshintshe umkhumbi khathesi uphila kuhle hatshi ngenxa yokwesaba, kodwa ngenxa yothando lomntwana.

Kolose 1:13 · Joha 1:12 · Joha 3:3 · Efesu 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Nxa owonayo ezwa ukuthula, esithi “uNkulunkulu usengithethelele,” kanti owahlukunyezwayo elokhe ehlupheka — kanti umusa kawutshiphile kakhulu yini?
s.faq.a3:
Umbuzo ufaneleyo, lobuhlungu buqotho. Kodwa isimangalo esinjalo kasisiso “ukuthethelela kweBhayibhili” — kuyikuphambanisa kwakho.

① Ukuthethelela kukaNkulunkulu kakutshiphile lakanye. Isono kasifihlwa kungathi “kasizange senzeke”; uNkulunkulu ngokwakhe wabhadala intengo yaso ngokuphila kweNdodana yakhe. Isiphambano kasiso ubufakazi bokuthi isono sithathwa kalula, kodwa bokuthi isono sinzima kangaka — yikuthethelela okudula kulakho konke emhlabeni.

② Ukuphenduka kweqiniso kuletha isithelo. Nxa owonayo ezikhukhumeza phambi kowahlukunyezwayo — “uNkulunkulu wangithethelela, ngakho ngilokuthula” — lokho kakusiyo ukuphenduka kodwa yikulingisela kwakho (Mathewu 3:8). Lokuthethelela phakathi komuntu loNkulunkulu kakususi inxeba lowahlukunyezwayo loba kumcindezele ukuthi athethelele.

③ Isono kasiyekelwa nje lakanye. Sonke isono sibhadalwa kwenye yezindawo ezimbili — kumbe uKristu usithwala esiphambanweni (kwabamthembayo kakusekho ukulahlwa, Roma 8:1), kumbe lowo omala ekucineni usithwala yena. Ngakho akukho “ukuthethelelwa okutshiphileyo.” Owonayo lokhe elomlandu wezomthetho kulumhlaba (Roma 13:1-4).

④ Izinyembezi zowahlukunyezwayo kazincane lakanye kuNkulunkulu. UNkulunkulu uyakhala labakhalayo, ukhumbula inyembezi yinye ngayinye, njalo uzazesula yena ekucineni (Isambulo 21:4). Ngakho owahlukunyezwayo kasweli ukuthwala umthwalo wokuphindisela yedwa, kodwa angawuyekela kuNkulunkulu olungileyo (Roma 12:19 — “Ngokwami ukuphindisela, ngizakuphindisela, kutsho iNkosi”).

Mathewu 3:8 · Roma 8:1 · Roma 13:1-4 · Isambulo 21:4
s.faq.q4: ▸ IBhayibhili liyindaba eyiqiniso ngempela yini? Likhanya njengenganekwane yakudala kumbe inoveli.
s.faq.a4:
Lo ngumbuzo olungileyo — njalo yindawo enhle yokuqalisa. Ukuthandabuza akusikho okuphambene lokukholwa kodwa yisifiso sokuhlola izinto ngokuthembeka. IBhayibhili kayisiyo nganekwane engaqondakaliyo yokuthi “ukholwe nxa uzizwa ufuna,” kodwa liyibhuku elibhalwe phezu kwezindawo, kwezinsuku, lakubantu abangamaqiniso. Nansi imizekeliso emilutshwana.

① Akusilo ibhuku elilodwa kodwa “ngumtshokotsho wamabhuku” — kanti lugeleza ngomutsho munye. IBhayibhili liyiqoqo lamabhuku angu-66 abhalwa phezu kweminyaka edlula 1 500 ngababhali abangaba ngu-40 — amakhosi, abelusi, abagoli benhlanzi, umthelisi, udokotela, abantu bezigaba lezikhathi ezehlukeneyo, bebhala bodwa bengaziani, ngezindimi ezintathu (isiHebheru, isi-Aramu, isiGiriki). Kanti konke kuhlangana, kungaphithizeli, endabeni eyodwa: insindiso ngoKristu. Lokho yikuvumelana okunzima ukukuchaza ngengozi kumbe ngokuhlelwa ngabantu.

② Liqhubeka liqinisekiswa emhlabathini (i-archaeology). Izinto ezinengi ezake zalahlwa kuthiwa zaqanjwa, “zitholakala eBhayibhilini kuphela,” zacina ziqinisekiswa ngokwemba. Usendo lukaDavida lwaqinisekiswa ngelitshe elilotshwe ukuthi “indlu kaDavida” (iTel Dan Stele); uPontiyusi Philathu, umbusi owabulala uJesu, ngombhalo othwele ibizo lakhe; umsele wamanzi wenkosi uHezekhiya (2 AmaKhosi 20:20) ngomsele uqobo lombhalo wawo. Lama-Hithi, ake athiwa “ngabantu abaqanjiweyo,” avela engumbuso omkhulu phakathi kwamanxiwa.

③ Liyincwadi yakudala elondolozwe kakhulu kulazo zonke (imibhalo yesandla). Ngenani lemibhalo yesandla esindayo, ukuvumelana kwayo, lesikhathi esiphakathi kokubhalwa lokukhitshelwa, iBhayibhili kalilakuqathaniswa phakathi kwezincwadi zakudala. Umqulu ka-Isaya owabhalwa uKristu engakafiki phakathi kweMiqulu yoLwandle Olufileyo (eyatholakala ngo-1947) wavumelana lombhalo omiselweyo weminyaka engaba yi-1 000 ngemva kwawo phose ngohlamvu ngohlamvu — ubufakazi bokuthi iBhayibhili lalondolozwa ngokuqonda kuzo zonke izizukulwane.

④ Izinto ezabhalwa kuqala zenzeka kanjalo (isiphrofetho). ITestamente Elidala, elabhalwa amakhulu eminyaka uJesu engakafiki, likhomba ngqo ukuzalwa kwakhe eBhethelehema (UMikha 5:2), inceku ehluphekayo (U-Isaya 53:5), lezimo zesiphambano (IHubo 22). Kucace kakhulu ukuthi kungalahlwa kuthiwe yingozi nje.

⑤ Abalandisi bomlando abangaphandle kweBhayibhili labo bakubhala. Umlandi womlando wamaRoma uThakithusi lomlandi womlando wamaJuda uJosefusi — kungekho lamunye wabo owayengumKristu — bakhuluma ngoJesu, ngokubulawa kwakhe, langebandla lokuqala. Phezu kwakho konke, abafundi ababehlakazekile ngokwesaba banikela impilo yabo befakazela ukuvuka kwabafileyo — kakho ofela into ayaziyo ukuthi ngamanga.

Kodwa ukuze sikhulume iqiniso, lezizizatho zitshengisa ukuthi ukukholwa iBhayibhili akusibuthutha kodwa kuqondile; akusibo “ubufakazi” obubamba njengomdwebo wezibalo. Ngakho isiqiniseko somKristu kasiveli ebufakazini bodwa, kodwa siphuma ekubeni lesibindi uMoya oNgcwele asipha enhliziyweni nxa umuntu efunda iLizwi. IBhayibhili lithi — “Ngakhoke ukukholwa kuvela ngokuzwa, lokuzwa kuvela ngelizwi likaKristu.” (Roma 10:17). Ngakho loba lingakhanya njengenganekwane kangakanani, ukulifunda wena ngokwakho yikho ukuqala. Ubufakazi buvula umnyango, kuthi isiqiniseko sikhule phakathi kwalowo ofundayo.

2 Kho 20:20 · Isaya 53:5 · UMikha 5:2 · Roma 10:17
s.respond.sub: Lolu thando kalusiyo ulwazi kodwa luyisimemo. Nxa uthando olwabethelwa esikhundleni sakho luthinte inhliziyo yakho, khuleka lokhu kancane, umzila ngomzila.
s.respond.prayer:
Nkulunkulu,

ngiyavuma ukuthi ngiyisoni esingeke sizisindise.

Ngiyakholwa ukuthi uJesu wafela mina esiphambanweni wavuka futhi.

Ngicela ungithethelele zonke izono zami, njalo kusukela khathesi ube yiNkosi yempilo yami.

Ngamukele njengomntanakho, ungenze ngiphile impilo entsha.

Ngebizo likaJesu ngiyakhuleka. Ameni.
s.respond.after: Nxa ukhulekile lokhu ngeqiniso, iBhayibhili lithi usuyibe ngumntwana kaNkulunkulu. Kawusewedwa — thola ibandla eliseduze uhambe indlela yokukholwa labanye.
s.respond.read: Bala iBhayibhili wena ngokwakho — qalisa ngoJohane
s.respond.verse: “Kodwa bonke abamamukelayo wabapha amandla okuba ngabantwana bakaNkulunkulu, labo abakholwa ebizweni lakhe.” — Joha 1:12 · Roma 10:9-10
s.closing.main:
UNkulunkulu munye,
ngendaba yinye,
uyasilandela ngo
thando olungaze luphele.
s.closing.verse: “Kasikho ukufa, lokusila … lakho konke okudaliweyo okuzakuba lamandla okusahlukanisa lothando lukaNkulunkulu olukuKristu Jesu, iNkosi yethu.” — Roma 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Kulumkhondo, uMlayo, iziNkondlo, abaProfethi, leziNcwadi kwengeza “inyama”.
Khathesi, loba uvula liphi ugwalo, uzabona ukuthi ungaphi endabeni.
s.about.line: Kusekelwe embonweni wembali yokuhlengwa odatshulwa lihlangothi elinengi lebandla lamaProthestani aseKorea (evangelical · Reformed).
